# Hash-pinned dependencies for the Scalyr agent monitor plugins
# (maxmind.py, powerquerymonitor.py, log_gen.py).
#
# SECURITY: the monitors do NOT install packages at runtime. A runtime
# `pip install` from public PyPI would execute arbitrary upstream code as
# root on every agent restart (CWE-494 / CWE-829). Install these dependencies
# once, out of band, before enabling any monitor:
#
#   pip install --require-hashes -r monitors/requirements.txt
#
# This is a fully hash-locked resolution (direct + transitive) generated from
# requirements.in. Regenerate whenever the direct pins in requirements.in change:
#
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file requirements.txt requirements.in
#
aiohappyeyeballs==2.6.1 \
    --hash=sha256:c3f9d0113123803ccadfdf3f0faa505bc78e6a72d1cc4806cbd719826e943558 \
    --hash=sha256:f349ba8f4b75cb25c99c5c2d84e997e485204d2902a9597802b0371f09331fb8
    # via aiohttp
aiohttp==3.13.5 \
